name: AccessControlProvisioner

neutralConcepts: knowledgeScope PRIVATE — access record is per-user per-group
upsert (not SETNX) — re-provisioning on tier change is valid

ironRules.rule: DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE MembershipActivated enqueue. Order: store-access-record → enqueue.
knowledgeScope = PRIVATE — access control records are per-user per-group.
Use upsert (not SETNX) — access control re-provisioning on tier change must succeed.

keywords: access control provisioner upsert private storeDocument before MembershipActivated
